project.name: IB Clinic
project.description: Full-stack clinic management system ported from a Unity desktop app. Backend Spring Boot 4 / Java 25 with JWT auth and PostgreSQL; frontend React 18 + Vite + Tailwind CSS.

nodes.label: .github/workflows/ci.yml
nodes.description: GitHub Actions CI pipeline. Triggers on push/PR to master and modernize branches. Runs two parallel jobs: backend-test (Java 25, JUnit/Testcontainers against a postgres:16-alpine service container) and frontend-build (Node 22, npm ci + npm run build). Uploads surefire reports and frontend dist as artifacts.

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.description: Project documentation covering stack overview (Spring Boot 4 / Java 25 / React 18 / Vite / Tailwind / PostgreSQL 16 / Flyway / Docker / AWS ECS Fargate), quick-start instructions, project structure, API endpoint table, role-based access (ADMIN, RECEPTIONIST, DOCTOR), frontend screens, test instructions, Docker full-stack setup, and environment variables.

nodes.label: backend/.env.example
nodes.description: Template for local .env overrides. Defines DATASOURCE_URL, DATASOURCE_USERNAME, DATASOURCE_PASSWORD, JWT_SECRET, JWT_EXPIRATION_MS, and optional AWS/ECS variables (AWS_REGION, AWS_ACCOUNT_ID, ECR_REPO).

nodes.label: backend/.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties
nodes.description: Maven wrapper configuration pinning Apache Maven 3.9.6 distribution and maven-wrapper 3.2.0.

nodes.label: backend/Dockerfile
nodes.description: Multi-stage Dockerfile. Build stage uses maven:3.9.12-eclipse-temurin-25-alpine to compile and package the Spring Boot jar (skipTests). Runtime stage uses eclipse-temurin:25-jre-alpine, runs as non-root user 'clinic', exposes port 8080, configures health check via /actuator/health, and starts with JVM container-aware flags (UseContainerSupport, MaxRAMPercentage=75).

nodes.label: backend/docker-compose.yml
nodes.description: Docker Compose file for local full-stack development. Defines two services: 'db' (postgres:16-alpine with health check, persistent pgdata volume) and 'app' (built from Dockerfile, depends on db being healthy, SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=docker, ports 8080:8080). Reads JWT_SECRET and JWT_EXPIRATION_MS from environment with defaults.

nodes.label: backend/ecs-task-definition.json
nodes.description: AWS ECS Fargate task definition for production deployment. Family 'ibclinic-backend', awsvpc networking, 512 CPU / 1024 MB memory. Container image from ECR, port 8080, SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=prod. Sensitive config (DATASOURCE_URL, DATASOURCE_USERNAME, DATASOURCE_PASSWORD, JWT_SECRET) pulled from AWS Secrets Manager. Health check via /actuator/health. Logs to CloudWatch /ecs/ibclinic-backend.

nodes.label: backend/pom.xml
nodes.description: Maven POM for the IB Clinic backend. GroupId com.ultimindstudio, artifactId clinic, Spring Boot 4.0.6 parent. Java 25. Key dependencies: spring-boot-starter-data-jpa, spring-boot-starter-web, spring-boot-starter-security, spring-boot-starter-validation, postgresql (runtime), flyway-database-postgresql, jjwt 0.12.6 (api/impl/jackson), jspecify, Lombok 1.18.46, springdoc-openapi 3.0.3, spring-boot-starter-actuator. Test dependencies: spring-boot-starter-test, spring-boot-starter-webflux, spring-security-test, testcontainers 1.20.4 (core/postgresql/junit-jupiter). Plugins: maven-surefire with Byte Buddy + Java 25 agent flags, maven-compiler with Lombok annotation processor, spring-boot-maven-plugin.

nodes.label: Application.java
nodes.description: Spring Boot application entry point. Annotated with @SpringBootApplication, bootstraps the application via SpringApplication.run().

nodes.label: DataSeeder.java
nodes.description: CommandLineRunner that seeds default users on application startup (non-prod profiles only). Creates 'admin' (ADMIN role, typeApp id=1) and 'doctor1' (DOCTOR role, typeApp id=2) if no logins exist. Uses BCrypt password encoding via PasswordEncoder.

nodes.label: OpenApiConfig.java
nodes.description: OpenAPI / Swagger configuration. Defines API title 'IB Clinic API' v1.0, applies a global bearerAuth security requirement using HTTP Bearer JWT scheme. Enables Swagger UI to send JWT tokens with all requests.

nodes.label: SecurityConfig.java
nodes.description: Spring Security configuration. Stateless session (JWT), CSRF disabled. Public paths: /api/v1/auth/**, /swagger-ui/**, /api-docs/**, /actuator/health, /actuator/info. All other requests require authentication. Injects JwtAuthenticationFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter. Configures DaoAuthenticationProvider with BCryptPasswordEncoder. CORS allows all origins, methods GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/OPTIONS, all headers with credentials.

nodes.label: AuthController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for authentication endpoints under /api/v1/auth. POST /login — public, accepts LoginRequest, returns LoginResponse with JWT token. POST /register — ADMIN only (@PreAuthorize), accepts RegisterUserRequest, returns LookupResponse with HTTP 201.

nodes.label: BeauticianController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for beautician (staff) management under /api/v1/beauticians. Paginated GET all, GET by id (authenticated). POST/PUT require ADMIN role. DELETE requires ADMIN role.

nodes.label: ClientController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for client management under /api/v1/clients. Paginated GET all, GET by id (authenticated). POST/PUT/DELETE require ADMIN role.

nodes.label: ClientPackageController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for client packages under /api/v1/client-packages. Paginated GET all, GET by id (authenticated). POST/PUT allow ADMIN or DOCTOR. DELETE requires ADMIN.

nodes.label: ClientPackageDetailController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for client package details under /api/v1/client-package-details. Paginated GET all, GET by id (authenticated). POST/PUT allow ADMIN or DOCTOR. DELETE requires ADMIN.

endpoints.summary: Get client package detail by id

nodes.label: DashboardController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for dashboard statistics under /api/v1/dashboard. GET /stats returns overall clinic stats (client count, today's schedule count, monthly revenue) as DashboardStatsResponse.

endpoints.summary: Overall clinic stats: client count, today's schedule, monthly revenue

nodes.label: HistoryController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for treatment histories under /api/v1/histories. Paginated GET all, GET by id (authenticated). POST/PUT allow ADMIN or DOCTOR. DELETE requires ADMIN.

nodes.label: HistoryInstallmentController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for installment payment histories under /api/v1/history-installments. Class-level @PreAuthorize('hasRole(ADMIN)') — all endpoints require ADMIN. Paginated GET all, GET by id, POST (create), PUT (update), DELETE.

nodes.label: InstallmentController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for installment plans under /api/v1/installments. Class-level @PreAuthorize('hasRole(ADMIN)') — all endpoints require ADMIN. Paginated GET all, GET by id, POST (create), PUT (update), DELETE.

nodes.label: LoginController.java
nodes.description: REST controller for user account management under /api/v1/users. Class-level @PreAuthorize('hasRole(ADMIN)'). GET all users (paginated, returns LookupResponse with id+username). DELETE user by id. Directly uses LoginRepository (bypasses service layer).

metadata.note: Directly uses repository, no service layer

properties.description: REST controller for notification CRUD. GET endpoints are open; POST/PUT/DELETE require ADMIN or DOCTOR role.
REST controller for occupation lookup table. Uses qualifier-injected LookupService. Mutations require ADMIN role.
REST controller for treatment packages. Mutations require ADMIN role.
REST controller for package line items (package details). Mutations require ADMIN role.
REST controller for products; class-level @PreAuthorize restricts entire controller to ADMIN.
Read-only report controller exposing paginated revenue list and total revenue sum; filterable by staffId and ISO date range.
REST controller for sales records; class-level ADMIN restriction.
REST controller for appointment schedules. GETs are open; mutations require ADMIN or DOCTOR.
REST controller for staff management. Mutations require ADMIN.
REST controller for client status lookup table. Uses qualifier-injected LookupService. Mutations require ADMIN.
REST controller for treatment catalogue. Mutations require ADMIN.
REST controller for appointment type lookup table. Uses qualifier-injected LookupService. Mutations require ADMIN.
REST controller for income type lookup table. Uses qualifier-injected LookupService. Mutations require ADMIN.
REST controller for payment type lookup table. Uses qualifier-injected LookupService. Mutations require ADMIN.
Generic lookup create/update request record holding a single required name string. Shared by all lookup-table controllers.
Generic lookup response record. Used as the response type for all lookup-table endpoints.
Request DTO for assigning a beautician staff member with a quantity to a service.
Request DTO for adding/updating a specific package detail item within a client's package.
Request DTO for assigning a package to a client tied to a schedule.
Request DTO for creating or updating a clinic client with full demographic fields and assigned staff.
Request DTO for recording a single installment payment event for a client.
Request DTO for creating a treatment history record linking a date, staff, client package and treatment.
Request DTO for creating an installment plan for a client with total, due date and remaining amount.
Authentication request DTO carrying username and password credentials.
Request DTO for creating or updating a notification with a scheduled datetime and description.

nodes.name: PackageDetailRequest
nodes.summary: Request DTO record for associating a treatment with a package, carrying treatmentId, packageId, and quantity (min 1) with Bean Validation constraints.

nodes.name: PackageRequest
nodes.summary: Request DTO record for creating or updating a clinic package, with a non-blank name and a non-null price validated to be >= 0.00.

nodes.name: ProductRequest
nodes.summary: Request DTO record for clinic product creation/update with name, quantity (min 0), price (>= 0.00), and weight fields, all validated with Bean Validation annotations.

nodes.name: RegisterUserRequest
nodes.summary: Request DTO record for user registration carrying username, password, and typeAppId (role/application type identifier) with NotBlank and NotNull validation.

nodes.name: SalesRequest
nodes.summary: Request DTO record for recording a sales transaction, referencing staffId, date, typePaymentId, typeIncomeId, clientId, price, and a non-blank description with full Bean Validation.

nodes.name: ScheduleRequest
nodes.summary: Request DTO record for creating a client appointment schedule, linking clientId, packageId, treatmentId, date, time, and statusId with NotNull validation.

nodes.name: StaffRequest
nodes.summary: Request DTO record for creating or updating a staff member, with name, address, phone, workplace, active flag, and occupationId reference validated via Bean Validation.

nodes.name: TreatmentRequest
nodes.summary: Request DTO record for creating or updating a treatment, carrying a non-blank name and a non-null price validated to be >= 0.00.

nodes.name: BeauticianResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record exposing a beautician's id, linked staffId, staffName, and quantity count for API serialization.

nodes.name: ClientPackageDetailResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a client-package detail line item, projecting id, clientPackageId, packageDetailId, treatmentName, and quantity.

nodes.name: ClientPackageResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record linking a client to a package and an optional schedule, projecting id, clientId, clientName, packageId, packageName, and scheduleId.

nodes.name: ClientResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a clinic client, projecting id, name, sex, address, phone, email, registeredDate, staffId, and staffName for full client profile display.

nodes.name: DashboardStatsResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record aggregating dashboard KPIs: totalClients, totalStaff, activeStaff, todayScheduleCount, currentMonthRevenue, and a list of today's ScheduleResponse objects.

nodes.name: HistoryInstallmentResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a historical installment payment entry, carrying id, clientId, clientName, date, and payment amount.

nodes.name: HistoryResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a treatment session history entry, projecting id, date, staffId/Name, clientPackageId, clientId/Name, treatmentId/Name, and a session note.

nodes.name: InstallmentResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for an installment plan, exposing id, clientId, clientName, total amount, date, dueDate, and remaining balance.

nodes.name: LoginResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record returned on successful authentication, containing JWT token, type (defaults to 'Bearer'), username, and role. Provides a convenience constructor that defaults the type.

nodes.name: NotificationResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a notification entry, projecting id, dateTime (LocalDateTime), and description text.

nodes.name: PackageDetailResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a package detail item, projecting id, treatmentId, treatmentName, packageId, packageName, and quantity.

nodes.name: PackageResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a clinic package, projecting id, name, and price.

nodes.name: ProductResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a clinic product, projecting id, name, quantity, price, and weight.

nodes.name: SalesResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a sales transaction, exposing id, staffId/Name, date, typePaymentId/Name, typeIncomeId/Name, clientId/Name, price, and description.

nodes.name: ScheduleResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for an appointment schedule, projecting id, clientId/Name, packageId/Name, treatmentId/Name, date, time, and statusId/Name for full schedule display.

nodes.name: StaffResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a staff member, projecting id, name, address, phone, workplace, active status, occupationId, and occupationName.

nodes.name: TreatmentResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO record for a treatment, projecting id, name, and price.

nodes.label: Beautician
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'beautician' table. Tracks a staff member acting as beautician with a quantity field.

nodes.label: Client
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'client' table. Stores clinic client personal info: name, sex, address, phone, email, registeredDate, and the staff who registered them.

nodes.label: ClientPackage
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'client_package' table. Join entity linking a Client to a Package and a Schedule.

nodes.label: ClientPackageDetail
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'client_package_detail' table. Line-item detail linking a ClientPackage to a PackageDetail with a quantity.

nodes.label: History
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'history' table. Records a treatment session with date, attending staff, client package, treatment performed, and optional notes.

nodes.label: HistoryInstallment
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'history_installment' table. Records individual installment payment events for a client (date + payment amount).

nodes.label: Installment
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'installment' table. Represents a client's installment plan: total amount, date, due date, and remaining balance.

nodes.label: Login
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'login' table. Implements Spring Security UserDetails. Stores username/password credentials and role (via TypeApp). Derives ROLE_ from typeApp.appType.

nodes.label: Notification
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'notification' table. Simple notification with a dateTime timestamp and a description string.

nodes.label: Occupation
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'occupation' table. Lookup/reference table for staff occupation roles (name only).

nodes.label: Package
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'service_package' table. Represents a clinic service package with a name and price.

nodes.label: PackageDetail
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'package_detail' table. Line-item specifying a treatment and quantity within a package.

nodes.label: Product
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'product' table. Represents a clinic product/item with name, quantity, price, and weight.

nodes.label: Sales
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'sales' table. Records a sales transaction: staff, date, payment type, income type, client, price, and description.

nodes.label: Schedule
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'schedule' table. Appointment/booking for a client's package/treatment with date, time, and status.

nodes.label: Staff
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'staff' table. Represents a clinic employee with name, address, phone, workplace, active flag, and occupation.

nodes.label: StatusClient
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'status_client' table. Lookup table for client/schedule status values (name only).

nodes.label: Treatment
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'treatment' table. Represents a specific clinic treatment/service with a name and price.

nodes.label: TypeApp
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'type_app' table. Lookup table for application user types/roles (appType field, unique). Used by Login to derive Spring Security roles.

nodes.label: TypeIncome
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'type_income' table. Lookup table for income classification types (name only).

nodes.label: TypePayment
nodes.description: JPA entity mapping to 'type_payment' table. Lookup table for payment method types (name only).

nodes.label: BusinessException
nodes.description: RuntimeException for business rule violations. Annotated @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST). Handled by GlobalExceptionHandler to return 400 responses.

nodes.label: GlobalExceptionHandler
nodes.description: Spring @RestControllerAdvice that centralizes exception handling for the entire application. Handles ResourceNotFoundException (404), BusinessException (400), MethodArgumentNotValidException (400 with field errors), BadCredentialsException (401), AccessDeniedException (403), and generic Exception (500).

nodes.label: ResourceNotFoundException
nodes.description: RuntimeException thrown when a requested resource is not found. Formats message as '<resource> not found with <field> = <value>'. Handled by GlobalExceptionHandler to return 404.

metadata.constructor: ResourceNotFoundException(String resource, String field, Object value)

nodes.label: BeauticianRepository
nodes.description: Spring Data JPA repository for the Beautician entity. Extends JpaRepository<Beautician, Long>. Provides standard CRUD plus custom query findByStaffId(Long staffId).

properties.description: JPA repository for ClientPackageDetail entity; finds details by parent client package ID
JPA repository for ClientPackage entity; finds packages by client ID
JPA repository for Client entity; supports paginated search by name and filtering by assigned staff
JPA repository for HistoryInstallment entity; retrieves installment history records by client

customMethods: findByDateBetween(LocalDate from, LocalDate to, Pageable pageable)
properties.description: JPA repository for History entity; supports filtering by client, staff, and date range with pagination
JPA repository for Installment entity; supports lookup by client and overdue detection by due date
JPA repository for Login entity; used for user credential lookup and username uniqueness checks during authentication
JPA repository for Notification entity; retrieves notifications within a date-time range or after a given timestamp
JPA repository for Occupation lookup entity; provides standard CRUD only
JPA repository for PackageDetail entity; retrieves detail lines by parent package or treatment
JPA repository for Package entity; provides standard CRUD only
JPA repository for Product entity; supports paginated name search

customMethods: findByDateBetween(LocalDate from, LocalDate to, Pageable pageable)
findByStaffIdAndDateBetween(Long staffId, LocalDate from, LocalDate to, Pageable pageable)
sumRevenue(@Param staffId, @Param from, @Param to) — JPQL aggregate for total revenue
properties.description: JPA repository for Sales entity; supports multi-dimensional filtering and a revenue aggregation query

customMethods: existsByClientIdAndDateAndTime(Long clientId, LocalDate date, LocalTime time)
properties.description: JPA repository for Schedule entity; supports filtering by client, date range, status, and duplicate-slot detection
JPA repository for Staff entity; retrieves active staff and filters by occupation
JPA repository for StatusClient lookup entity; provides standard CRUD only
JPA repository for Treatment lookup entity; provides standard CRUD only
JPA repository for TypeApp lookup entity; provides standard CRUD only
JPA repository for TypeIncome lookup entity; provides standard CRUD only
JPA repository for TypePayment lookup entity; provides standard CRUD only
Spring Security filter that runs once per request; extracts Bearer JWT from Authorization header, validates it via JwtTokenProvider, loads UserDetails and sets authentication in SecurityContextHolder

publicMethods: generateToken(UserDetails userDetails) — builds signed JWT with subject + roles claim
validateToken(String token) — validates JWT signature and expiry
properties.description: JWT generation and validation utility; uses HMAC-SHA signing key derived from configurable secret; embeds roles as a claim
Spring Security UserDetailsService implementation; delegates username lookup to LoginRepository; Login entity must implement UserDetails
Package-level @NullMarked annotation for the security package (jspecify)
Service interface for authentication operations: login and user registration

nodes.label: BeauticianService
nodes.description: Service interface for beautician CRUD operations (findAll, findById, create, update, delete) with paginated results.

nodes.label: ClientPackageDetailService
nodes.description: Service interface for client package detail CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: ClientPackageService
nodes.description: Service interface for client package CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: ClientService
nodes.description: Service interface for client CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: DashboardService
nodes.description: Service interface exposing a single getStats() method returning DashboardStatsResponse.

nodes.label: HistoryInstallmentService
nodes.description: Service interface for history installment CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: HistoryService
nodes.description: Service interface for treatment history CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: InstallmentService
nodes.description: Service interface for installment CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: LookupService
nodes.description: Generic shared service interface for lookup-table entities (findAll, findById, create, update, delete) used by multiple lookup controllers.

nodes.label: NotificationService
nodes.description: Service interface for notification CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: PackageDetailService
nodes.description: Service interface for package detail CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: PackageService
nodes.description: Service interface for treatment package CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: ProductService
nodes.description: Service interface for product CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: ReportService
nodes.description: Service interface for revenue reporting: getRevenue (paginated sales by staff/date range) and getTotalRevenue (aggregate BigDecimal).

nodes.label: SalesService
nodes.description: Service interface for sales transaction CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: ScheduleService
nodes.description: Service interface for appointment schedule CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: StaffService
nodes.description: Service interface for staff CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: TreatmentService
nodes.description: Service interface for treatment CRUD operations with pagination.

nodes.label: AuthServiceImpl
nodes.description: Implements AuthService. Handles login (Spring AuthenticationManager + JwtTokenProvider) and user registration (duplicate-check, password encoding, Login entity persistence). Injects LoginRepository, TypeAppRepository, JwtTokenProvider, AuthenticationManager, PasswordEncoder.

nodes.label: BeauticianServiceImpl
nodes.description: Implements BeauticianService. Manages beautician records linking Staff to beautician entries. Injects BeauticianRepository and StaffRepository.

nodes.label: ClientPackageDetailServiceImpl
nodes.description: Implements ClientPackageDetailService. Links ClientPackage to PackageDetail with a quantity. Injects ClientPackageDetailRepository, ClientPackageRepository, PackageDetailRepository.

nodes.label: ClientPackageServiceImpl
nodes.description: Implements ClientPackageService. Associates Client, Package, and Schedule into a ClientPackage. Injects ClientPackageRepository, ClientRepository, PackageRepository, ScheduleRepository.

nodes.label: ClientServiceImpl
nodes.description: Implements ClientService. Creates/updates Client entities with associated Staff (marketing officer). Injects ClientRepository and StaffRepository.

nodes.label: DashboardServiceImpl
nodes.description: Implements DashboardService. Aggregates stats: total clients, total/active staff, today's schedules, month revenue. Injects ClientRepository, StaffRepository, ScheduleRepository, SalesRepository.

nodes.label: HistoryInstallmentServiceImpl
nodes.description: Implements HistoryInstallmentService. Tracks payment installment history per client. Injects HistoryInstallmentRepository and ClientRepository.

nodes.label: HistoryServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for clinic history records. Manages CRUD operations for History entities, cross-referencing Staff, ClientPackage, and Treatment.

nodes.label: InstallmentServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for installment payment tracking. Manages CRUD for Installment entities linked to Client.

nodes.label: NotificationServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for notification management. Manages CRUD for Notification entities.

nodes.label: OccupationServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for occupation lookup data. Implements the generic LookupService interface for Occupation entities. Spring bean name 'occupationService'.

nodes.label: PackageDetailServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for package details (treatments within packages). Cross-references PackageDetail, Package, and Treatment repositories.

nodes.label: PackageServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for clinic service packages. Manages CRUD for Package entities with name and price.

nodes.label: ProductServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for product inventory. Manages CRUD for Product entities (name, quantity, price, weight).

nodes.label: ReportServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for revenue reporting. Queries SalesRepository with date range and optional staffId filters; provides paged sales results and total revenue aggregation.

nodes.label: SalesServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for sales records. Cross-references Sales, Staff, TypePayment, TypeIncome, and Client repositories.

nodes.label: ScheduleServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for appointment scheduling. Includes duplicate booking prevention (existsByClientIdAndDateAndTime check). Cross-references Schedule, Client, Package, Treatment, and StatusClient repositories.

nodes.label: StaffServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for staff management. Manages CRUD for Staff entities linked to Occupation.

nodes.label: StatusClientServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for client status lookup data. Implements generic LookupService for StatusClient entities. Spring bean name 'statusClientService'.

nodes.label: TreatmentServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for treatment catalog. Manages CRUD for Treatment entities (name, price).

nodes.label: TypeAppServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for application type lookup (ADMIN/DOCTOR roles). Implements generic LookupService for TypeApp entities. Spring bean name 'typeAppService'.

nodes.label: TypeIncomeServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for income type lookup data. Implements generic LookupService for TypeIncome entities. Spring bean name 'typeIncomeService'.

nodes.label: TypePaymentServiceImpl
nodes.description: Service implementation for payment type lookup data. Implements generic LookupService for TypePayment entities. Spring bean name 'typePaymentService'.

nodes.label: service.impl package-info
nodes.description: Package declaration for service implementation classes.

nodes.label: service package-info
nodes.description: Package declaration for service interface classes.

nodes.label: application.properties
nodes.description: Default Spring Boot application configuration. Defines PostgreSQL datasource (localhost:5432/ibclinic), JPA/Hibernate settings, Flyway migration location, JWT secret/expiration, and SpringDoc/OpenAPI paths.

nodes.label: application-docker.properties
nodes.description: Docker Spring profile configuration. Overrides datasource credentials and JWT settings from environment variables. Sets INFO/DEBUG logging levels.

nodes.label: application-heroku.properties
nodes.description: Legacy Heroku Spring profile configuration. Overrides datasource and JWT settings from environment variables. Deprecated deployment target.

nodes.label: application-prod.properties
nodes.description: Production Spring profile configuration. Environment-variable datasource and JWT, strict DDL validation, actuator health probes, WARN/INFO logging levels.

nodes.label: V1__Initial_Schema.sql
nodes.description: Flyway V1 migration defining the full initial database schema for IB Clinic. Creates 18 tables covering lookups, staff, clients, packages, scheduling, sales, and history. Seeds ADMIN and DOCTOR type_app rows.

nodes.label: logback-spring.xml
nodes.description: Spring-profile-aware Logback configuration. Dev profile: console appender with DEBUG for com.ultimindstudio. Prod/docker profile: structured JSON console appender at WARN level with INFO for com.ultimindstudio.

properties.prodDockerProfile: JSON console, WARN root, INFO com.ultimindstudio

nodes.label: AbstractIntegrationTest
nodes.description: Abstract base class for integration tests. Uses Testcontainers to spin up a postgres:16-alpine container with reuse enabled. Dynamically injects datasource properties into test context. Activates 'test' Spring profile.

nodes.label: IbClinicApplicationTests.java
nodes.description: Spring Boot context load test; extends AbstractIntegrationTest to verify application context starts successfully.

nodes.label: AuthControllerIT.java
nodes.description: Integration tests for AuthController covering login success/failure, user registration as admin, and public health-check endpoint using WebTestClient against a random-port server.

nodes.label: ClientControllerIT.java
nodes.description: Integration tests for ClientController verifying CRUD operations with role-based access: admin can create/delete clients, doctors get 403 on creation, unauthenticated requests get 401.

nodes.label: AuthServiceImplTest.java
nodes.description: Unit tests for AuthServiceImpl using Mockito: validates JWT token generation on login, exception propagation on bad credentials, user registration with password encoding, and duplicate username rejection.

nodes.label: ClientServiceImplTest.java
nodes.description: Unit tests for ClientServiceImpl using Mockito: covers paginated findAll, findById with not-found exception, create with staff validation, update, and delete with not-found guard.

nodes.label: ScheduleServiceImplTest.java
nodes.description: Unit tests for ScheduleServiceImpl: paginated findAll, create with full entity resolution, double-booking prevention (BusinessException), and delete with not-found guard.

nodes.label: application-test.properties
nodes.description: Test-profile Spring configuration: JPA validate DDL, Flyway enabled, JWT secret and expiration for test environment.

nodes.label: index.html
nodes.description: HTML shell for the React SPA. Defines the #root mount point and loads /src/main.jsx as a module script.

nodes.label: package.json
nodes.description: Frontend package manifest: React 18, react-router-dom 6, axios; dev deps include Vite, Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, autoprefixer. Requires Node >= 22.

nodes.label: postcss.config.js
nodes.description: PostCSS configuration enabling Tailwind CSS and autoprefixer plugins.

nodes.label: App.jsx
nodes.description: Root React component defining all application routes. Contains ProtectedRoute (redirects to /login if no JWT) and AdminRoute (requires isAdmin()) guards. Maps paths to page components inside a shared Layout.

nodes.label: client.js
nodes.description: Axios instance configured with baseURL /api/v1. Request interceptor injects Bearer JWT from localStorage (clinic_token). Response interceptor clears auth storage and redirects to /login on 401.

nodes.label: Layout.jsx
nodes.description: Application shell with a fixed crimson header bar (branding, username, logout) and a collapsible sidebar navigation. Renders child routes via <Outlet>. Admin-only nav items (Reports) are filtered by isAdmin().

nodes.label: Modal.jsx
nodes.description: Reusable modal dialog with crimson header, scrollable body, optional footer slot, backdrop click dismiss, and Escape key close. Returns null when isOpen is false.

nodes.label: AuthContext.jsx
nodes.description: React auth context. AuthProvider manages user and token state (persisted in localStorage). Provides login (POST /api/v1/auth/login), logout (clears storage + navigates to /login), isAdmin(), isDoctor(). useAuth() hook enforces provider wrapping.

nodes.label: index.css
nodes.description: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and custom utility classes for buttons (btn-primary, btn-secondary, btn-danger, btn-info, btn-crimson), table elements (table-header, table-cell, table-row), form elements (form-group, form-label, form-input), badges, and stat-card layout.

nodes.label: main.jsx
nodes.description: React application entry point. Mounts the app into #root with React.StrictMode, BrowserRouter, and AuthProvider wrapping App.

nodes.label: Clients.jsx
nodes.description: Clients page with tabbed view: Clients (paginated CRUD with client history modal) and Installments (paginated CRUD). Calls /clients, /installments, /staff, and /histories endpoints. Uses Modal for add/edit/history dialogs.

nodes.label: Dashboard.jsx
nodes.description: Dashboard page displaying stat cards (total clients, staff, today schedules, monthly revenue from /dashboard/stats) and clickable module cards for all app sections. Admin-only modules are filtered.

nodes.label: Login.jsx
nodes.description: Login page with username/password form. Calls AuthContext.login(); on success navigates to /dashboard. Displays API error messages.

nodes.label: Products.jsx
nodes.description: Products page with paginated table and CRUD modal. Manages product name, net weight, stock (color-coded low-stock warning), and price. Calls /products endpoint.

nodes.label: Reports.jsx
nodes.description: Admin-only Reports page showing total all-time revenue card and a filterable revenue table (by date range and staff). Calls /reports/revenue/total and /reports/revenue with query params.

nodes.label: Sales.jsx
nodes.description: Sales page with four tabs (Products, Treatments, Packages, Installments) to list sellable items. Sell/Pay modal creates a sale at /sales or pays an installment at /installments/:id/pay. Shows recent transactions.

nodes.label: Schedule.jsx
nodes.description: Schedule page with paginated table and add/edit modal. Manages appointments linking clients, packages, treatments, date/time, and status. Displays status badges (Done, Cancelled, Booked). Calls /schedules, /clients, /packages, /treatments, /status-clients.

nodes.label: Staff.jsx
nodes.description: Staff management page with paginated table and add/edit modal. Fields: name, phone, address, workplace, occupation (dropdown from /occupations), active toggle. Calls /staff endpoint.

components: PackageDetailModal — fetches and displays treatments within a package
Treatments (default export) — full page with dual-tab CRUD for treatments and packages
properties.description: Full-page treatments management component with tabbed UI for treatments and packages; supports paginated listing, create/edit/delete via Modal dialogs, and package detail drill-down

exports: formatRupiah(amount) — formats a number as Indonesian Rupiah (Rp.) using id-ID locale
formatDate(date) — formats a date as id-ID locale date string; returns '-' for falsy
formatTime(time) — truncates a time string to HH:MM; returns '-' for falsy
formatDateTime(datetime) — combines id-ID date and short time (HH:MM); returns '-' for falsy
properties.description: Pure utility module exporting four locale-aware formatting helpers for currency (Rupiah), date, time, and datetime; used across multiple page components
Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom clinic brand colors (crimson primary and clinic accent palette) scanned across all JS/JSX and index.html files
Vite build configuration with React plugin and dev-server proxy forwarding /api and /actuator requests to the Spring Boot backend on port 8080
Mise (formerly rtx) tool version pinning file; locks the project to Node.js 22.22.3 for reproducible frontend builds

edges.description: Request/response pair for the Package domain entity
Request/response pair for the PackageDetail domain entity
Request/response pair for the Product domain entity
Request/response pair for the Sales domain entity
Request/response pair for the Schedule/Appointment domain entity
Request/response pair for the Staff domain entity
Request/response pair for the Treatment domain entity
DashboardStatsResponse embeds a List<ScheduleResponse> for today's schedules
Both represent installment data; HistoryInstallmentResponse is the historical view, InstallmentResponse is the current plan view
ClientPackageDetailResponse is a line-item detail of a ClientPackageResponse (client-package association)
PackageDetailResponse represents a treatment line-item within a PackageResponse
PackageDetailResponse references a treatment (by treatmentId/treatmentName), mirroring TreatmentResponse fields
BeauticianResponse references a staff member via staffId/staffName, a subset view of StaffResponse
ScheduleResponse includes packageId/packageName, referencing the Package domain
ScheduleResponse includes treatmentId/treatmentName, referencing the Treatment domain
SalesResponse includes clientId/clientName, referencing the Client domain
HistoryResponse references treatmentId/treatmentName, linking to the Treatment domain

layers.name: Frontend UI
layers.description: React pages, components, context, and application entry points

layers.name: Frontend Infrastructure
layers.description: Frontend build config, API client, styles, and utilities

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: Spring REST controllers exposing HTTP endpoints

layers.description: Service interfaces and their implementations containing business logic

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.description: JPA repositories, DTOs (request/response), and SQL schema migrations

tour.title: What Is IB Clinic?
tour.description: Start here to understand the project at a glance. IB Clinic is a full-stack clinic management system ported from a Unity 5.3 desktop app. The README documents the complete technology stack (Spring Boot 4 / Java 25 / React 18 / Vite / Tailwind / PostgreSQL 16 / Flyway / Docker / AWS ECS Fargate), the eleven functional modules (Auth, Dashboard, Clients, Staff, Treatments, Packages, Products, Sales, Schedule, Installments, Reports), and the three user roles (ADMIN, DOCTOR, RECEPTIONIST). It also covers quick-start instructions, the full API endpoint table, and production deployment to AWS ECS Fargate — making it the single best orientation document before diving into code.

tour.title: Backend Entry Point
tour.description: Every Spring Boot application starts with a single class annotated @SpringBootApplication. Application.java is that class — it calls SpringApplication.run() which triggers component scan, auto-configuration, and bean wiring for the entire backend. The companion pom.xml pins the stack: Spring Boot 4.0.6 parent, Java 25, and key dependencies including spring-boot-starter-security, jjwt 0.12.6 for JWT tokens, Flyway for database migrations, springdoc-openapi 3.0.3 for Swagger UI, and Testcontainers 1.20.4 for integration tests. Understanding this file gives you the full dependency story before reading any business logic.

tour.title: Security & Authentication — JWT Pipeline
tour.description: Security is stateless and JWT-based. The chain works as follows: SecurityConfig declares a stateless session policy, disables CSRF, whitelists public paths (/api/v1/auth/**, /swagger-ui/**, /actuator/health), and inserts JwtAuthenticationFilter before the standard username/password filter. On every request JwtAuthenticationFilter extracts the Bearer token from the Authorization header, hands it to JwtTokenProvider for HMAC-SHA signature validation, then loads the matching Login entity via UserDetailsServiceImpl (which delegates to LoginRepository) and sets authentication in the SecurityContextHolder. JwtTokenProvider also handles token generation at login time, embedding the user's role as a claim. CORS is configured to allow all origins with credentials, suitable for the React SPA on a different port during development.

tour.title: Database Schema — The Single Migration
tour.description: All 21 database tables are created by a single Flyway migration: V1__Initial_Schema.sql. Flyway applies this script automatically on startup and tracks it by checksum so it only ever runs once. The schema covers the full domain: lookup tables (occupation, type_app, type_payment, type_income, status_client), core entities (staff, login, client, beautician), service catalogue (service_package, treatment, product), scheduling (schedule), sales and financial tracking (sales, installment, history_installment), and package/treatment assignment (package_detail, client_package, client_package_detail, history). The migration also seeds the two type_app rows — ADMIN and DOCTOR — that are required for the role system to work. Reading this file before the JPA entities gives you the relational foundation from which all the Java model is derived.

tour.title: Domain Entities & JPA Data Model
tour.description: The domain model is implemented as JPA entities using Hibernate. Four representative entities illustrate the key patterns across the codebase. Login implements Spring Security's UserDetails directly — its getAuthorities() derives ROLE_ADMIN or ROLE_DOCTOR from the linked TypeApp lookup, tying security to the data model. Client stores clinic patient demographics and holds a @ManyToOne reference to the Staff member who registered them (the marketing officer relationship). Schedule is the appointment entity: it links Client, Package, and Treatment with a date, time, and status, and its createdToday queries power the dashboard stats. Staff is the central hub entity — nearly every other entity references it. All entities follow the same Lombok + JPA pattern (@Entity, @Table, @Id, @ManyToOne) established throughout the project.

tour.title: Repository & Data Access Layer
tour.description: All data access goes through Spring Data JPA repositories — interfaces that extend JpaRepository<Entity, Long> and gain standard CRUD plus pagination for free. The three highlighted repositories show progressively richer query patterns. ClientRepository adds paginated name search (findByNameContainingIgnoreCase) and filter by assigned staff. ScheduleRepository adds duplicate-slot detection (existsByClientIdAndDateAndTime) and date-range queries used by the dashboard. SalesRepository goes furthest — it includes a @Query JPQL aggregate (sumRevenue) that computes total revenue for the Reports feature, filtering by optional staffId and date range. LoginRepository is the security-critical one: findByUsername drives Spring Security's UserDetailsService, and existsByUsername enforces the duplicate-username constraint on registration.

tour.title: Service Layer — Business Logic
tour.description: The service layer implements all business logic behind clean interfaces (one interface per domain, one Impl in the impl/ sub-package). AuthServiceImpl is the most security-intensive: it delegates login to Spring's AuthenticationManager, then calls JwtTokenProvider.generateToken() and returns the token in a LoginResponse; registration checks username uniqueness via existsByUsername, BCrypt-encodes the password, and persists a new Login entity. ScheduleServiceImpl demonstrates domain rule enforcement — it calls existsByClientIdAndDateAndTime before creating a booking and throws a BusinessException (mapped to HTTP 400) if the slot is already taken, preventing double-bookings. DashboardServiceImpl shows cross-repository aggregation: it queries four repositories (ClientRepository, StaffRepository, ScheduleRepository, SalesRepository) to build the single DashboardStatsResponse record with KPIs and today's schedule list.

tour.title: REST API Controllers
tour.description: Controllers are thin HTTP adapters — they receive validated request DTOs (@Valid), delegate to the service layer, and wrap results in ResponseEntity. AuthController (under /api/v1/auth) exposes two public-by-config endpoints: POST /login returns a JWT token, and POST /register is locked to ADMIN via @PreAuthorize. ClientController demonstrates the RBAC pattern used across all resource controllers: GET endpoints are open to any authenticated user, while POST/PUT/DELETE require the ADMIN role. DashboardController is the simplest: a single GET /api/v1/dashboard/stats endpoint that returns the aggregated clinic KPIs. The remaining 16+ controllers follow the same three-level access pattern (public / authenticated / ADMIN-only), with some controllers like HistoryInstallmentController applying a class-level @PreAuthorize for uniform restriction.

tour.title: Frontend Entry Point & Routing
tour.description: The React frontend is a standard Vite SPA. main.jsx is the HTML mount point: it calls ReactDOM.createRoot('#root') then wraps the tree in React.StrictMode, BrowserRouter (React Router v6), and AuthProvider (the auth context). App.jsx owns all route definitions. It declares two route guards as inline components: ProtectedRoute redirects unauthenticated users to /login by checking for a JWT in localStorage; AdminRoute extends that check by also calling isAdmin() from the auth context. All authenticated routes render inside a shared Layout component (fixed header + collapsible sidebar + Outlet). The route table maps every functional module to its page component — Dashboard, Clients, Staff, Treatments, Products, Sales, Schedule, Reports — completing the full frontend navigation picture.

tour.title: Frontend Authentication — AuthContext
tour.description: AuthContext.jsx is the authentication brain of the frontend. AuthProvider manages two pieces of state — user (username + role) and token — both persisted to localStorage under the keys clinic_user and clinic_token, so they survive page refreshes. It exposes a login() function that calls POST /api/v1/auth/login, stores the returned JWT and user object, then lets the caller navigate; a logout() that clears both storage keys and redirects to /login; and isAdmin() / isDoctor() helpers that inspect the stored role string. The companion client.js is the Axios instance: a request interceptor injects the Bearer token on every outgoing API call, and a response interceptor auto-clears auth storage and redirects to /login on any 401 response — closing the loop on token expiry without any per-page handling.

tour.title: React Pages — The Clinic UI
tour.description: The page components follow a consistent pattern throughout the frontend: fetch data on mount via the apiClient, hold it in local state, and render a table with add/edit/delete actions that open a shared Modal dialog. Dashboard.jsx is the landing page — it fetches /dashboard/stats and renders four StatCard KPIs (total clients, staff, today's schedules, monthly revenue formatted as Indonesian Rupiah), plus clickable MODULE_CARDS that link to every section. Clients.jsx is one of the richer pages: it uses a tabbed view (Clients / Installments), supports a client history drill-down modal, and calls five different API endpoints. Schedule.jsx adds domain-specific UI — a StatusBadge component that colour-codes appointment states (Done, Cancelled, Booked) and a datetime-aware form that coordinates client, package, treatment, and status lookups. All monetary values across the app flow through format.js: formatRupiah() uses the id-ID locale (Indonesian Rupiah), while formatDate/formatTime/formatDateTime handle locale-aware display — reflecting the system's Indonesian business context.

tour.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
tour.description: The deployment infrastructure is fully containerised and CI-gated. The backend Dockerfile uses a multi-stage build: a maven:3.9.12-eclipse-temurin-25-alpine build stage compiles the jar (skipTests for image builds), then a lean eclipse-temurin:25-jre-alpine runtime stage copies only the jar, runs as a non-root user named 'clinic', exposes port 8080, and starts with JVM container-aware flags (UseContainerSupport, MaxRAMPercentage=75) and a health check at /actuator/health. The docker-compose.yml wires the full local stack: a postgres:16-alpine 'db' service with a health check and persistent pgdata volume, and the 'app' service built from the Dockerfile, which waits for db to be healthy before starting. The GitHub Actions pipeline (ci.yml) runs two parallel jobs on every push and pull request to master: backend-test (Java 25, JUnit/Testcontainers against a postgres:16-alpine service container) and frontend-build (Node 22, npm ci + npm run build), uploading surefire reports and the dist artifact. Together these three files ensure the system is reproducible locally and validated automatically on every change.
